description_long: This is a low-top athletic shoe featuring a dark navy blue upper adorned with a vibrant floral pattern in shades of pink, coral, and white. The shoe has a prominent white Nike Swoosh logo on both sides, with a white and light blue midsole that extends to the heel for added support. The lacing system is standard, with black laces threading through reinforced eyelets. The outsole appears to be made of rubber with a gum-colored section visible at the toe. The overall design is sporty yet stylish, suitable for casual wear or athletic activities in urban environments.
description: A floral-patterned navy athletic shoe with a white Nike Swoosh, white and light blue midsole, and gum rubber outsole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the floral toe box, black laces, and rounded gum outsole.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large white Nike Swoosh, floral upper, and white/light blue midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white and light blue heel counter and the back of the floral upper.
description_view_3: Right side view with a mirrored Nike Swoosh, floral pattern, and visible midsole details.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on both lateral and medial sides of the shoe.
